Text: Use this tool to delete all Markers placed in the map.
Use this tool to add Markers to the map. Shift-Click over a Marker to delete it. Click over a marker to cycle Marker color.
Use this tool to delete all Rulers placed in the map.

Use this tool to add/edit Rulers. Click a block, select orientation by moving the mouse, click outside/inside ruler preview to add ruler. Ctrl-Click on ruler block adds a gap, Ctrl-Click increases gap, Ctrl-Click red block to reset ruler.
